name: Strawberry Sourdough Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, lightly beat the eggs. Mix in the oil and sugar, then add the sourdough.
2. Add the flour and baking soda. Stir until the flour is just blended.
3. Gently fold in the strawberries and walnuts. Do not overmix; this will prevent the bread from becoming tough.
4. Butter and lightly flour an 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 inch loaf pan.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and place it on the center rack of the oven.
6. Bake for 1 hour and 20 minutes at 350°F, or until an inserted toothpick comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and turn onto a wire rack to cool.
8. Cut and serve warm with fresh strawberry jam or strawberries and whipped cream.
